title: A question about the song Komm susser tod
display_title: A question about the song Komm susser tod
wikitext:
[]: A question about the song Komm susser, tod.             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Wed Oct 09, 2013 10:48 am Is there a difference between the movie version of the song and the single version of the song, or are they both the same?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 09, 2013 1:10 pm The Director's Edit and Single version are different, yes: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Komm_susser_tod#Notes
